payload.summary: gog Gmail auth for jwatson@unwindvacations.com: refresh token captured and saved to ~/Library/Application Support/gogcli/keyring/jwatson@unwindvacations.com.json but gog auth list still shows 'No tokens stored' — gog may be using macOS Keychain instead of file-based storage. Next step: investigate gog keyring_backend, try security add-generic-password or gog auth add --keyring-backend file.
